chapter_title.en: Going to the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.) Is Equal to Performing Hajj Several Times

text: 6 وَ عَنْهُ عَنْ سَعْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ صَدَقَةَ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) قَالَ مَنْ زَارَ الْحُسَيْنَ (ع) كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ ثَمَانِينَ حِجَّةً مَبْرُورَةً

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 6. My father narrated to me from Sa’d, from Muḥammad ibn Ḥusain, from Muḥammad ibn Sadaqah, from Mālik ibn ‘Aťiyyah, who said: Abū ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) said: Allāh will register eighty purified Hajj for those who go to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain (a.s.).
